params.amounts: Gross amounts per merchant (before fee deduction).

claimYield().notice: Claim accumulated yield from pool fees.

lpPendingYield(address).notice: View: how much yield an LP can claim right now.

openBnpl(address[],uint256[]).notice: Open a BNPL line: instantly pays merchants from the pool.

registerMerchant(string,string).notice: Anyone can register themselves as a merchant.

registerMerchantFor(address,string,strin.notice: Owner can also register a merchant on behalf of an address.

setReputation(address).notice: Set the reputation contract address so repay() can auto-record.

updateMerchant(string,string).notice: Merchant can update their own name and category.
